mapper.select: select A.* from ( select lead(boardNo) over(order by boardNo desc) as preNo ,lead(boardName) over(order by boardNo desc) as preName , lag(boardNo) over(order by boardNo desc) as nextNo , lag(boardName) over(order by boardNo desc) as nextName ,boardNo, boardName, boardContent, fk_id, createdAtBoard, fk_categoryNo from board ) A where A.boardno = #{boardNo}
